objects.name: Applicant
objects.description: A person who submits an Application and supporting Documents through the public portal.
objects.descriptionZh: 通过公共门户提交申请及佐证文件的个人。
objects.relationship_description: Applicant belongs to Household. Applicant submits Application. Applicant.household_id references Household.

properties.name: residency_verified
properties.descriptionZh: 由 IDV 依据 [BR-06] 设定。

sources.snippet: ### 2.1 Applicant (申请人) — owner: PORTAL/PBE-CMS

objects.name: Household
objects.description: The household unit whose size and income are tested against program eligibility thresholds.
objects.descriptionZh: 其规模与收入用于检验项目资格阈值的家庭单位。

sources.snippet: ### 2.2 Household (家庭) — owner: PBE-CMS

objects.name: Application
objects.description: A request for a benefit or permit, screened, verified, and adjudicated through a Case.
objects.descriptionZh: 对福利或许可的请求，经审查、核验并通过案件裁定。
objects.relationship_description: Applicant submits Application. Application opens Case. Application has document Document. Application.applicant_id references Applicant.

sources.snippet: ### 2.3 Application (申请) — owner: PBE-CMS

objects.name: Case
objects.description: The adjudication container opened per Application; the unit of recertification and appeal.
objects.descriptionZh: 为每个申请开立的裁定容器，是复核与申诉的单位。
objects.relationship_description: Application opens Case. Case has determination Determination. Case.application_id references Application.

sources.snippet: ### 2.4 Case (案件) — owner: PBE-CMS

objects.name: EligibilityCriterion
objects.description: A versioned eligibility test (e.g. income threshold by household size) applied by the eligibility engine.
objects.descriptionZh: 由资格引擎应用的、带版本的资格测试（如按家庭规模设定的收入阈值）。

properties.name: threshold_value
properties.descriptionZh: 按家庭规模设定的收入上限。

sources.snippet: ### 2.5 EligibilityCriterion (资格条件) — owner: PBE-CMS

objects.name: Document
objects.description: A submitted supporting file (income, residency, identity, hardship) with a verification status.
objects.descriptionZh: 提交的佐证文件（收入、居住、身份、困难），带核验状态。
objects.relationship_description: Application has document Document. Document.application_id references Application.

sources.snippet: ### 2.6 Document (文件) — owner: DMS

objects.name: Determination
objects.description: The recorded decision (Approved/Denied) on a Case, snapshotting the decisive criterion and ruleset version.
objects.descriptionZh: 对案件作出的已记录决定（批准/拒绝），并快照决定性条件与规则集版本。
objects.relationship_description: Case has determination Determination. Determination cites EligibilityCriterion. Determination yields Permit. Appeal contests Determination. Determination.case_id references Case. Determination.decisive_criterion_id references EligibilityCriterion.

sources.snippet: ### 2.7 Determination (裁定) — owner: PBE-CMS

objects.name: Permit
objects.description: An issued operating/occupancy permit with an expiry, optionally subject to inspection.
objects.descriptionZh: 已核发的运营/占用许可证，带有效期，部分须接受验收。
objects.relationship_description: Determination yields Permit. Permit requires inspection Inspection. Permit paid by Payment. Permit.determination_id references Determination. Permit.payment_id references Payment.

sources.snippet: ### 2.8 Permit (许可证) — owner: PBE-CMS

objects.name: Inspection
objects.description: A physical check of a permitted activity, recorded as Passed or Failed.
objects.descriptionZh: 对获许可活动的实地检查，记录为通过或不通过。
objects.relationship_description: Permit requires inspection Inspection. Inspection.permit_id references Permit.

sources.snippet: ### 2.9 Inspection (验收) — owner: PBE-CMS

objects.name: Payment
objects.description: A permit fee transaction collected through the payment gateway; must clear before issuance.
objects.descriptionZh: 通过支付网关收取的许可费交易；须结清后方可核发。
objects.relationship_description: Permit paid by Payment. Payment.application_id references Application.

sources.snippet: ### 2.10 Payment (缴费) — owner: PAY

objects.name: Appeal
objects.description: A challenge to a Determination, filed within the statutory window and decided by an Appeals Officer.
objects.descriptionZh: 对裁定的异议，须在法定期限内提出并由申诉官裁决。
objects.relationship_description: Appeal contests Determination. Appeal.determination_id references Determination.

sources.snippet: ### 2.11 Appeal (申诉) — owner: PBE-CMS

relationships.name: belongs_to
relationships.description: Each Applicant belongs to one Household whose size and income are tested.

sources.snippet: `household_id` | uuid | **FK** → Household

relationships.name: submits
relationships.description: An Applicant submits the Application and supporting Documents through PORTAL.

sources.snippet: Submits the Application and supporting Documents.

relationships.name: opens
relationships.description: SubmitApplication produces an Application and opens a new Case.

sources.snippet: produces an Application in status `Submitted` and opens a new `Case`.

relationships.name: has_document
relationships.description: An Application carries a set of supporting Documents, each verified independently.

sources.snippet: `application_id` | uuid | **FK** → Application

relationships.name: has_determination
relationships.description: A Case yields one or more Determinations (initial plus revisions on overturn).

sources.snippet: `case_id` | uuid | **FK** → Case

relationships.name: cites
relationships.description: Every Determination cites a decisive EligibilityCriterion and ruleset version.

sources.snippet: Every `Determination` cites a `decisive_criterion_id` and `ruleset_version`

relationships.name: yields
relationships.description: An approved permit Determination yields an issued Permit.

sources.snippet: `IssuePermit` consumes the approved Determination and the cleared Payment; produces a `Permit` in status `Active`

relationships.name: requires_inspection
relationships.description: A Permit in an inspectable class requires one or more Inspections.

sources.snippet: `permit_id` | uuid | **FK** → Permit

relationships.name: paid_by
relationships.description: A Permit is paid for by a cleared Payment before issuance.

sources.snippet: `payment_id` | uuid | **FK** → Payment [BR-09]

relationships.name: contests
relationships.description: An Appeal contests a recorded Determination.

sources.snippet: `determination_id` | uuid | **FK** → Determination

rules.businessLogicRuleName: All required Documents verified before Determination
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Application may not reach Determination until every required Document has been verified and is on file.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Rules governing when and by whom Documents must be verified before a Case advances, plus the emergency-intake exception.
rules.title: All required Documents verified before Determination
rules.titleZh: 裁定前须核验全部必需文件

statement.en: An Application may not reach Determination until every required Document has been verified and is on file.
statement.zh: 在每一份必需文件均已核验并归档之前，申请不得进入裁定。

sources.snippet: An Application may not reach Determination until every required Document has been verified and is on file.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Separation of duties on Document verification
rules.standardizedLogicRule: Each required Document must be verified by a Caseworker other than the Intake Clerk who logged it.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Rules governing when and by whom Documents must be verified before a Case advances, plus the emergency-intake exception.
rules.title: Separation of duties on Document verification
rules.titleZh: 文件核验职责分离

statement.en: Each required Document must be verified by a Caseworker other than the Intake Clerk who logged it.
statement.zh: 每份必需文件必须由不同于登记该文件的受理员的个案工作者核验。

sources.snippet: Each required Document must be verified by a Caseworker other than the Intake Clerk who logged it.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Determination statutory time limit
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Determination must be recorded within 30 business days of the ApplicationSubmitted event for benefit programs, and within 45 business days for permit applications.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Statutory time limits for recording a Determination and suspension/resumption of the clock.
rules.title: Determination statutory time limit
rules.titleZh: 裁定法定时限

statement.en: A Determination must be recorded within 30 business days of the ApplicationSubmitted event for benefit programs, and within 45 business days for permit applications.
statement.zh: 福利项目须在 ApplicationSubmitted 事件后 30 个工作日内、许可申请须在 45 个工作日内记录裁定。

sources.snippet: A Determination must be recorded within 30 business days of the ApplicationSubmitted event for benefit programs, and within 45 business days for permit applications.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Suspend the clock on ReturnedIncomplete
rules.standardizedLogicRule: The processing clock shall be suspended on the date an Application is set to ReturnedIncomplete and shall resume on the date the missing Document is received.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Statutory time limits for recording a Determination and suspension/resumption of the clock.
rules.title: Suspend the clock on ReturnedIncomplete
rules.titleZh: 退回不完整时暂停时钟

statement.en: The processing clock shall be suspended on the date an Application is set to ReturnedIncomplete and shall resume on the date the missing Document is received.
statement.zh: 处理时钟应在申请被置为 ReturnedIncomplete 之日暂停，并在收到缺失文件之日恢复。

rules.formal: Application.status = 'ReturnedIncomplete' ⇒ clock.suspended = true; on Document.received ⇒ clock.resumed = true

sources.snippet: The processing clock shall be suspended on the date an Application is set to ReturnedIncomplete and shall resume on the date the missing Document is received.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Income over threshold is ineligible
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Applicant whose Household income exceeds the published program threshold for their Household size is ineligible, and the resulting Determination must be Denied.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Substantive eligibility tests: income threshold, residency recency, and one-active-case limit.
rules.title: Income over threshold is ineligible
rules.titleZh: 收入超过阈值即不合格

statement.en: An Applicant whose Household income exceeds the published program threshold for their Household size is ineligible, and the resulting Determination must be Denied.
statement.zh: 申请人的家庭收入超过其家庭规模对应的项目阈值时即不合格，相应裁定必须为拒绝。

sources.snippet: An Applicant whose Household income exceeds the published program threshold for their Household size is ineligible, and the resulting Determination must be Denied.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Residency Document recency
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Applicant is required to demonstrate residency within the jurisdiction by a Document dated no more than 90 days before the ApplicationSubmitted event.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Substantive eligibility tests: income threshold, residency recency, and one-active-case limit.
rules.title: Residency Document recency
rules.titleZh: 居住证明时效

statement.en: An Applicant is required to demonstrate residency within the jurisdiction by a Document dated no more than 90 days before the ApplicationSubmitted event.
statement.zh: 申请人须凭日期早于 ApplicationSubmitted 事件不超过 90 天的文件，证明其在辖区内居住。

sources.snippet: An Applicant is required to demonstrate residency within the jurisdiction by a Document dated no more than 90 days before the ApplicationSubmitted event.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Supervisor approval over value thresholds
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Caseworker may not record a Determination whose associated benefit value exceeds $25,000 annually or whose permit fee exceeds $5,000 without Supervisor approval.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Escalation thresholds, denial citation, ruleset versioning, and override justification governing Determinations.
rules.title: Supervisor approval over value thresholds
rules.titleZh: 超额须主管批准

statement.en: A Caseworker may not record a Determination whose associated benefit value exceeds $25,000 annually or whose permit fee exceeds $5,000 without Supervisor approval.
statement.zh: 在未经主管批准的情况下，个案工作者不得记录关联福利价值年逾 25,000 美元或许可费逾 5,000 美元的裁定。

sources.snippet: A Caseworker may not record a Determination whose associated benefit value exceeds $25,000 annually or whose permit fee exceeds $5,000 without Supervisor approval.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Denied Determination must cite criterion and rule
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Denied Determination shall include the specific EligibilityCriterion and the rule citation that was the basis for denial.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Escalation thresholds, denial citation, ruleset versioning, and override justification governing Determinations.
rules.title: Denied Determination must cite criterion and rule
rules.titleZh: 拒绝裁定须援引条件与规则

statement.en: A Denied Determination shall include the specific EligibilityCriterion and the rule citation that was the basis for denial.
statement.zh: 拒绝裁定应载明作为拒绝依据的具体资格条件及规则引用。

sources.snippet: A Denied Determination shall include the specific EligibilityCriterion and the rule citation that was the basis for denial.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Payment cleared before Permit issuance
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Permit may not be issued until its associated Payment has cleared in full, unless the Applicant qualifies for a documented fee waiver.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Payment, inspection, expiry, re-inspection, and fee-waiver rules across the Permit lifecycle.
rules.title: Payment cleared before Permit issuance
rules.titleZh: 缴费结清后方可核发许可

statement.en: A Permit may not be issued until its associated Payment has cleared in full, unless the Applicant qualifies for a documented fee waiver.
statement.zh: 在关联缴费全额结清之前不得核发许可，除非申请人符合有据可查的费用豁免。

sources.snippet: A Permit may not be issued until its associated Payment has cleared in full, unless the Applicant qualifies for a documented fee waiver.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Inspectable Permit requires passed Inspection
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Permit in an inspectable class is required to undergo a physical Inspection, and may not move to Active-Verified status until that Inspection is recorded as Passed.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Payment, inspection, expiry, re-inspection, and fee-waiver rules across the Permit lifecycle.
rules.title: Inspectable Permit requires passed Inspection
rules.titleZh: 须验收许可须通过验收

statement.en: A Permit in an inspectable class is required to undergo a physical Inspection, and may not move to Active-Verified status until that Inspection is recorded as Passed.
statement.zh: 属可验收类别的许可须接受实地验收，且在该验收记录为通过之前不得转为 Active-Verified 状态。

sources.snippet: A Permit in an inspectable class is required to undergo a physical Inspection, and may not move to Active-Verified status until that Inspection is recorded as Passed.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Appeal filing window of 30 days
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Appeal must be filed within 30 calendar days of the DeterminationNotified event, after which the Determination is final.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Appeal filing window, benefit-reduction pause, and decision time limit.
rules.title: Appeal filing window of 30 days
rules.titleZh: 申诉 30 日提出期限

statement.en: An Appeal must be filed within 30 calendar days of the DeterminationNotified event, after which the Determination is final.
statement.zh: 申诉须在 DeterminationNotified 事件后 30 个日历日内提出，逾期裁定即为终局。

rules.formal: Appeal.filed_at − DeterminationNotified.at ≤ 30 days; else Determination.final = true

sources.snippet: An Appeal must be filed within 30 calendar days of the DeterminationNotified event, after which the Determination is final.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Pause benefit reduction once Appeal filed
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A benefit reduction or suspension shall be paused once an Appeal is filed and may not resume until the AppealDecided event.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Appeal filing window, benefit-reduction pause, and decision time limit.
rules.title: Pause benefit reduction once Appeal filed
rules.titleZh: 提出申诉后暂停福利削减

statement.en: A benefit reduction or suspension shall be paused once an Appeal is filed and may not resume until the AppealDecided event.
statement.zh: 一旦提出申诉，福利的削减或中止应予暂停，且在 AppealDecided 事件之前不得恢复。

sources.snippet: A benefit reduction or suspension shall be paused once an Appeal is filed and may not resume until the AppealDecided event.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Permit expiry within 12 months
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An issued Permit shall carry an expiry date no later than 12 months after its issue date, unless the permit class is designated permanent in the Program Eligibility Manual.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Payment, inspection, expiry, re-inspection, and fee-waiver rules across the Permit lifecycle.
rules.title: Permit expiry within 12 months
rules.titleZh: 许可有效期不超过 12 个月

statement.en: An issued Permit shall carry an expiry date no later than 12 months after its issue date, unless the permit class is designated permanent in the Program Eligibility Manual.
statement.zh: 已核发许可的到期日不得晚于其核发日后 12 个月，除非该许可类别在《项目资格手册》中被指定为永久。

sources.snippet: An issued Permit shall carry an expiry date no later than 12 months after its issue date, unless the permit class is designated permanent in the Program Eligibility Manual.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Re-inspect failed Permit within 30 days or revoke
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Permit whose Inspection is recorded as Failed must be re-inspected within 30 calendar days, after which an unresolved failure moves the Permit to Revoked.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Payment, inspection, expiry, re-inspection, and fee-waiver rules across the Permit lifecycle.
rules.title: Re-inspect failed Permit within 30 days or revoke
rules.titleZh: 验收不通过须 30 日内复检否则吊销

statement.en: A Permit whose Inspection is recorded as Failed must be re-inspected within 30 calendar days, after which an unresolved failure moves the Permit to Revoked.
statement.zh: 验收记录为不通过的许可须在 30 个日历日内复检，逾期仍未解决的，许可转为吊销。

rules.formal: Inspection.status = 'Failed' ⇒ reinspect within 30 days; else Permit.status := 'Revoked'

sources.snippet: A Permit whose Inspection is recorded as Failed must be re-inspected within 30 calendar days, after which an unresolved failure moves the Permit to Revoked.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Determination records ruleset version in force
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Determination must record the version of the EligibilityCriterion rule set that was in force on the determination date.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Escalation thresholds, denial citation, ruleset versioning, and override justification governing Determinations.
rules.title: Determination records ruleset version in force
rules.titleZh: 裁定须记录生效规则集版本

statement.en: A Determination must record the version of the EligibilityCriterion rule set that was in force on the determination date.
statement.zh: 裁定须记录在裁定之日生效的资格条件规则集版本。

sources.snippet: A Determination must record the version of the EligibilityCriterion rule set that was in force on the determination date.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Appeal decision within 45 days
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Appeals Officer is required to issue the AppealDecided outcome within 45 calendar days of the AppealFiled event.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Appeal filing window, benefit-reduction pause, and decision time limit.
rules.title: Appeal decision within 45 days
rules.titleZh: 申诉须 45 日内裁决

statement.en: An Appeals Officer is required to issue the AppealDecided outcome within 45 calendar days of the AppealFiled event.
statement.zh: 申诉官须在 AppealFiled 事件后 45 个日历日内作出 AppealDecided 结果。

sources.snippet: An Appeals Officer is required to issue the AppealDecided outcome within 45 calendar days of the AppealFiled event.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Recertify benefit Case every 12 months
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A benefit Case must be recertified at least every 12 months, and a Household may not continue receiving benefits past the recertification due date without a renewed Determination.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Recertification interval and automatic suspension on lapse past the grace period.
rules.title: Recertify benefit Case every 12 months
rules.titleZh: 福利案件每 12 个月复核

statement.en: A benefit Case must be recertified at least every 12 months, and a Household may not continue receiving benefits past the recertification due date without a renewed Determination.
statement.zh: 福利案件须至少每 12 个月复核一次，家庭在复核到期日之后若无续期裁定不得继续领取福利。

rules.formal: Case.program = BENEFIT ⇒ recertInterval ≤ 12 months ∧ (now > Case.recert_due_date ⇒ renewedDetermination required)

sources.snippet: A benefit Case must be recertified at least every 12 months, and a Household may not continue receiving benefits past the recertification due date without a renewed Determination.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Suspend Case on recertification lapse past grace
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Case whose recertification lapses beyond a 14-day grace period shall be suspended automatically, and the associated Permit, if any, shall move to Expired.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Recertification interval and automatic suspension on lapse past the grace period.
rules.title: Suspend Case on recertification lapse past grace
rules.titleZh: 复核超宽限期失效则中止案件

statement.en: A Case whose recertification lapses beyond a 14-day grace period shall be suspended automatically, and the associated Permit, if any, shall move to Expired.
statement.zh: 复核失效超过 14 天宽限期的案件应自动中止，关联许可（如有）转为到期。

sources.snippet: A Case whose recertification lapses beyond a 14-day grace period shall be suspended automatically, and the associated Permit, if any, shall move to Expired.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: One Active benefit Case per program
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Applicant may not hold more than one Active benefit Case for the same program at the same time.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Substantive eligibility tests: income threshold, residency recency, and one-active-case limit.
rules.title: One Active benefit Case per program
rules.titleZh: 每项目仅一活动福利案件

statement.en: An Applicant may not hold more than one Active benefit Case for the same program at the same time.
statement.zh: 申请人不得同时就同一项目持有一个以上的活动福利案件。

sources.snippet: An Applicant may not hold more than one Active benefit Case for the same program at the same time.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Override requires Supervisor justification, not retroactive
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An override of an automated ineligibility result requires a recorded Supervisor justification and may not be applied retroactively to prior Determinations.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Escalation thresholds, denial citation, ruleset versioning, and override justification governing Determinations.
rules.title: Override requires Supervisor justification, not retroactive
rules.titleZh: 推翻须主管理由且不溯及

statement.en: An override of an automated ineligibility result requires a recorded Supervisor justification and may not be applied retroactively to prior Determinations.
statement.zh: 推翻自动不合格结果须有记录在案的主管理由，且不得追溯适用于先前的裁定。

sources.snippet: An override of an automated ineligibility result requires a recorded Supervisor justification and may not be applied retroactively to prior Determinations.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Fee waiver exception requires verified hardship
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A fee waiver, as an exception to the Payment-clearance rule, is granted only on a verified hardship Document and recorded against the Case.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Payment, inspection, expiry, re-inspection, and fee-waiver rules across the Permit lifecycle.
rules.title: Fee waiver exception requires verified hardship
rules.titleZh: 费用豁免须经核验困难证明

statement.en: A fee waiver, as an exception to the Payment-clearance rule, is granted only on a verified hardship Document and recorded against the Case.
statement.zh: 作为缴费结清规则的例外，费用豁免仅凭经核验的困难证明文件授予，并记录在案件名下。

sources.snippet: Fee waiver (exception to [BR-09]): granted only on a verified hardship Document and recorded against the Case.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Emergency intake exception with later verification
rules.standardizedLogicRule: As an exception to the verification rule, a Determination may issue on an unverified Document set where the Applicant presents a qualifying emergency, subject to verification within 10 business days.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Rules governing when and by whom Documents must be verified before a Case advances, plus the emergency-intake exception.
rules.title: Emergency intake exception with later verification
rules.titleZh: 紧急受理例外须事后核验

statement.en: As an exception to the verification rule, a Determination may issue on an unverified Document set where the Applicant presents a qualifying emergency, subject to verification within 10 business days.
statement.zh: 作为核验规则的例外，申请人提出合格紧急情况时，裁定可基于未核验的文件集作出，但须在 10 个工作日内完成核验。

rules.formal: emergency(Applicant) ⇒ Determination may issue on unverified Documents ∧ verify within 10 business days

sources.snippet: Emergency intake (exception to [BR-01]): a Determination may issue on an unverified Document set where the Applicant presents a qualifying emergency, subject to verification within 10 business days.

ruleGroups.rationale: Rules governing when and by whom Documents must be verified before a Case advances, plus the emergency-intake exception.
Statutory time limits for recording a Determination and suspension/resumption of the clock.
Substantive eligibility tests: income threshold, residency recency, and one-active-case limit.
Escalation thresholds, denial citation, ruleset versioning, and override justification governing Determinations.
Payment, inspection, expiry, re-inspection, and fee-waiver rules across the Permit lifecycle.
Appeal filing window, benefit-reduction pause, and decision time limit.
Recertification interval and automatic suspension on lapse past the grace period.

actions.name: SubmitApplication
actions.description: Applicant submits a draft Application and Document set via the portal, producing a Submitted Application and opening a Case.
actions.descriptionZh: 申请人通过门户提交申请草稿及文件集，生成已提交申请并开立案件。

action_steps.name: captureApplicantProfileAndDraftApplication
action_steps.description: Capture Applicant profile and draft Application in PORTAL.

action_steps.name: attachUploadedDocumentSetAndPOST
action_steps.description: Attach uploaded Document set and POST to PBE-CMS.

action_steps.name: setApplicationStatusToSubmittedAnd
action_steps.description: Set Application status to Submitted and open a new Case; start the statutory clock.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "SubmitApplication" action. Applicant submits a draft Application and Document set via the portal, producing a Submitted Application and opening a Case. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "SubmitApplication" using applicant, draft_application, documents. Applicant submits a draft Application and Document set via the portal, producing a Submitted Application and opening a Case. Produce application, case and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Capture Applicant profile and draft Application in PORTAL.
text.zh: 在门户中采集申请人资料与申请草稿。

text.en: Attach uploaded Document set and POST to PBE-CMS.
text.zh: 附加上传的文件集并提交至 PBE-CMS。

text.en: Set Application status to Submitted and open a new Case; start the statutory clock.
text.zh: 将申请状态置为已提交并开立新案件；启动法定时钟。

agent.toolDescription: Submit a draft Application with its supporting Documents and open a Case.
promptHints: Confirm the Document set is non-empty before submitting.

sources.snippet: `SubmitApplication` consumes the Applicant profile, the draft Application, and the uploaded Document set; produces an Application in status `Submitted` and opens a new `Case`.

actions.name: ScreenCompleteness
actions.description: Intake Clerk checks the submitted Document set against the required-Document list, accepting or returning the Application.
actions.descriptionZh: 受理员将提交的文件集与必需文件清单比对，受理或退回申请。

action_steps.name: pullDocumentInventoryFromDMSFor
action_steps.description: Pull Document inventory from DMS for the Application.

action_steps.name: compareAgainstTheProgramSRequired
action_steps.description: Compare against the program's required-Document list.

action_steps.name: ifAnyRequiredDocumentIsMissing
action_steps.description: If any required Document is missing set status ReturnedIncomplete and suspend the clock; otherwise set Accepted.

rules.name: Suspend the clock on ReturnedIncomplete
rules.description: The processing clock shall be suspended on the date an Application is set to ReturnedIncomplete and shall resume on the date the missing Document is received.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "ScreenCompleteness" action. Intake Clerk checks the submitted Document set against the required-Document list, accepting or returning the Application. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "ScreenCompleteness" using application, documents. Intake Clerk checks the submitted Document set against the required-Document list, accepting or returning the Application. Produce application and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Pull Document inventory from DMS for the Application.
text.zh: 从 DMS 拉取该申请的文件清单。

text.en: Compare against the program's required-Document list.
text.zh: 与项目的必需文件清单比对。

text.en: If any required Document is missing set status ReturnedIncomplete and suspend the clock; otherwise set Accepted.
text.zh: 若缺少任何必需文件则置为退回不完整并暂停时钟；否则置为已受理。

agent.toolDescription: Screen an Application for completeness against the required-Document list.
promptHints: Cite which required Document type is missing when returning.

sources.snippet: `ScreenCompleteness` checks the submitted Document set against the program's required-Document list. If any required Document is missing, the Application is set to `ReturnedIncomplete`; otherwise to `Accepted`.

actions.name: VerifyDocument
actions.description: Caseworker verifies each Document content from DMS, marking it Verified or Rejected with a reason code.
actions.descriptionZh: 个案工作者从 DMS 核验每份文件内容，标记为已核验或已拒绝并附原因码。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event APPLICATION_ACCEPTED has been received
2. Event RECERTIFICATION_DUE has been received
3. Rule "Separation of duties on Document verification" is satisfied

action_steps.name: readDocumentContentFromDMS
action_steps.description: Read Document content from DMS.

action_steps.name: verifyByACaseworkerOtherThan
action_steps.description: Verify by a Caseworker other than the Intake Clerk who logged it.

rules.name: Separation of duties on Document verification
rules.description: Each required Document must be verified by a Caseworker other than the Intake Clerk who logged it.

action_steps.name: markVerifiedOrRejectedWithA
action_steps.description: Mark Verified or Rejected with a reason code; residency Documents must be within recency.

rules.name: Residency Document recency
rules.description: An Applicant is required to demonstrate residency within the jurisdiction by a Document dated no more than 90 days before the ApplicationSubmitted event.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "VerifyDocument" action. Caseworker verifies each Document content from DMS, marking it Verified or Rejected with a reason code. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "VerifyDocument" using document. Caseworker verifies each Document content from DMS, marking it Verified or Rejected with a reason code. Produce document and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Read Document content from DMS.
text.zh: 从 DMS 读取文件内容。

text.en: Verify by a Caseworker other than the Intake Clerk who logged it.
text.zh: 由不同于登记人的个案工作者核验。

text.en: Mark Verified or Rejected with a reason code; residency Documents must be within recency.
text.zh: 标记为已核验或已拒绝并附原因码；居住文件须在时效内。

agent.toolDescription: Verify a single Document and set its status to Verified or Rejected.
promptHints: Enforce separation of duties: verifier must not be the logger.
Reject residency Documents older than 90 days.

sources.snippet: `VerifyDocument` is performed per Document; each is marked `Verified` or `Rejected` with a reason code.

actions.name: EvaluateEligibility
actions.description: Caseworker (via the eligibility engine) tests verified Application and Household data against the active EligibilityCriterion set, producing a draft Determination.
actions.descriptionZh: 个案工作者通过资格引擎，将已核验的申请与家庭数据与生效资格条件集比对，生成裁定草稿。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event DOCUMENT_VERIFIED has been received
2. Rule "All required Documents verified before Determination" is satisfied
3. Rule "Income over threshold is ineligible" is satisfied
4. Rule "Residency Document recency" is satisfied

action_steps.name: confirmEveryRequiredDocumentIsVerified
action_steps.description: Confirm every required Document is Verified before evaluating.

rules.name: All required Documents verified before Determination
rules.description: An Application may not reach Determination until every required Document has been verified and is on file.

action_steps.name: testHouseholdIncomeAgainstTheThreshold
action_steps.description: Test Household income against the threshold for its size.

rules.name: Income over threshold is ineligible
rules.description: An Applicant whose Household income exceeds the published program threshold for their Household size is ineligible, and the resulting Determination must be Denied.

action_steps.name: produceADraftDeterminationWithThe
action_steps.description: Produce a draft Determination with the decisive criterion attached.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "EvaluateEligibility" action. Caseworker (via the eligibility engine) tests verified Application and Household data against the active EligibilityCriterion set, producing a draft Determination. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "EvaluateEligibility" using application, household, verified_documents, criteria. Caseworker (via the eligibility engine) tests verified Application and Household data against the active EligibilityCriterion set, producing a draft Determination. Produce draft_determination and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Confirm every required Document is Verified before evaluating.
text.zh: 在评估前确认每份必需文件均已核验。

text.en: Test Household income against the threshold for its size.
text.zh: 将家庭收入与其规模对应的阈值比对。

text.en: Produce a draft Determination with the decisive criterion attached.
text.zh: 生成附带决定性条件的裁定草稿。

agent.toolDescription: Evaluate eligibility and produce a draft Determination with the decisive criterion.
promptHints: Attach the decisive EligibilityCriterion and ruleset version to the draft.

sources.snippet: `EvaluateEligibility` consumes the verified Application, the Household composition (size), and the income figures, then tests them against the active `EligibilityCriterion` set ... It produces a **draft** `Determination` with the decisive criterion attached.

actions.name: RecordDetermination
actions.description: Caseworker finalizes the draft Determination as Approved or Denied, snapshotting the ruleset version and citation.
actions.descriptionZh: 个案工作者将裁定草稿定案为批准或拒绝，并快照规则集版本与引用。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event ELIGIBILITY_EVALUATED has been received
2. Event APPROVAL_REQUESTED has been received
3. Rule "Supervisor approval over value thresholds" is satisfied
4. Rule "Denied Determination must cite criterion and rule" is satisfied
5. Rule "Determination records ruleset version in force" is satisfied
6. Rule "Override requires Supervisor justification, not retroactive" is satisfied

action_steps.name: ifBenefitValueOrFeeExceeds
action_steps.description: If benefit value or fee exceeds caseworker authority, escalate to Supervisor first.

rules.name: Supervisor approval over value thresholds
rules.description: A Caseworker may not record a Determination whose associated benefit value exceeds $25,000 annually or whose permit fee exceeds $5,000 without Supervisor approval.

action_steps.name: finalizeOutcomeAsApprovedOrDenied
action_steps.description: Finalize outcome as Approved or Denied; record ruleset version in force.

rules.name: Determination records ruleset version in force
rules.description: A Determination must record the version of the EligibilityCriterion rule set that was in force on the determination date.

action_steps.name: forADenialAttachTheSpecific
action_steps.description: For a Denial, attach the specific EligibilityCriterion and rule citation.

rules.name: Denied Determination must cite criterion and rule
rules.description: A Denied Determination shall include the specific EligibilityCriterion and the rule citation that was the basis for denial.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "RecordDetermination" action. Caseworker finalizes the draft Determination as Approved or Denied, snapshotting the ruleset version and citation. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "RecordDetermination" using draft_determination. Caseworker finalizes the draft Determination as Approved or Denied, snapshotting the ruleset version and citation. Produce determination and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: If benefit value or fee exceeds caseworker authority, escalate to Supervisor first.
text.zh: 若福利价值或费用超过个案工作者权限，先升级至主管。

text.en: Finalize outcome as Approved or Denied; record ruleset version in force.
text.zh: 将结果定为批准或拒绝；记录生效规则集版本。

text.en: For a Denial, attach the specific EligibilityCriterion and rule citation.
text.zh: 如为拒绝，附上具体资格条件与规则引用。

agent.toolDescription: Finalize a draft Determination as Approved or Denied with required citations.
promptHints: Block if value exceeds authority without Supervisor approval.
Denials must cite the decisive criterion.

sources.snippet: `RecordDetermination` finalizes the draft as `Approved` or `Denied`.

actions.name: EscalateForApproval
actions.description: Routes a Determination exceeding caseworker authority to a Supervisor for sign-off.
actions.descriptionZh: 将超过个案工作者权限的裁定路由至主管签核。
actions.submission_criteria: 1. Rule "Supervisor approval over value thresholds" is satisfied

action_steps.name: setDeterminationStatusToPendingApproval
action_steps.description: Set Determination status to PendingApproval and route to the Supervisor queue.

rules.name: Supervisor approval over value thresholds
rules.description: A Caseworker may not record a Determination whose associated benefit value exceeds $25,000 annually or whose permit fee exceeds $5,000 without Supervisor approval.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated system responsible for the "EscalateForApproval" action. Routes a Determination exceeding caseworker authority to a Supervisor for sign-off. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "EscalateForApproval" using determination. Routes a Determination exceeding caseworker authority to a Supervisor for sign-off. Produce determination and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Set Determination status to PendingApproval and route to the Supervisor queue.
text.zh: 将裁定状态置为待批准并路由至主管队列。

agent.toolDescription: Escalate a high-value Determination to a Supervisor for approval.

sources.snippet: If the case value or override exceeds caseworker authority `[BR-07]`, `EscalateForApproval` first routes the Determination to a Supervisor (status `PendingApproval`).

actions.name: CollectPayment
actions.description: Collects the permit fee through the payment gateway, producing a Cleared (or Failed) Payment.
actions.descriptionZh: 通过支付网关收取许可费，生成已结清（或失败）的缴费。

action_steps.name: presentTheFeeScheduleAndCollect
action_steps.description: Present the fee schedule and collect the Applicant payment instrument via PAY.

action_steps.name: authorizeAndClearThePaymentSet
action_steps.description: Authorize and clear the Payment; set status Cleared on success.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "CollectPayment" action. Collects the permit fee through the payment gateway, producing a Cleared (or Failed) Payment. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "CollectPayment" using applicant, fee_amount. Collects the permit fee through the payment gateway, producing a Cleared (or Failed) Payment. Produce payment and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Present the fee schedule and collect the Applicant payment instrument via PAY.
text.zh: 通过 PAY 出示收费表并收取申请人支付工具。

text.en: Authorize and clear the Payment; set status Cleared on success.
text.zh: 授权并结清缴费；成功时置为已结清。

agent.toolDescription: Collect a permit fee Payment and clear it through the gateway.

sources.snippet: `CollectPayment` consumes the fee schedule and Applicant payment instrument; produces a `Payment` in status `Cleared`.

actions.name: IssuePermit
actions.description: Issues an Active Permit from an approved Determination and a cleared Payment, with issue and expiry dates.
actions.descriptionZh: 凭已批准裁定与已结清缴费核发活动许可，并设定核发与到期日。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event PAYMENT_CLEARED has been received
2. Event DETERMINATION_RECORDED has been received
3. Rule "Payment cleared before Permit issuance" is satisfied
4. Rule "Permit expiry within 12 months" is satisfied

action_steps.name: confirmTheDeterminationIsApprovedAnd
action_steps.description: Confirm the Determination is Approved and the Payment is Cleared (or fee waiver).

rules.name: Payment cleared before Permit issuance
rules.description: A Permit may not be issued until its associated Payment has cleared in full, unless the Applicant qualifies for a documented fee waiver.

action_steps.name: issueThePermitAsActiveWith
action_steps.description: Issue the Permit as Active with an expiry no later than 12 months unless permanent.

rules.name: Permit expiry within 12 months
rules.description: An issued Permit shall carry an expiry date no later than 12 months after its issue date, unless the permit class is designated permanent in the Program Eligibility Manual.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated system responsible for the "IssuePermit" action. Issues an Active Permit from an approved Determination and a cleared Payment, with issue and expiry dates. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "IssuePermit" using determination, payment. Issues an Active Permit from an approved Determination and a cleared Payment, with issue and expiry dates. Produce permit and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Confirm the Determination is Approved and the Payment is Cleared (or fee waiver).
text.zh: 确认裁定为批准且缴费已结清（或费用豁免）。

text.en: Issue the Permit as Active with an expiry no later than 12 months unless permanent.
text.zh: 核发活动许可，到期日除永久类外不晚于 12 个月。

agent.toolDescription: Issue an Active Permit from an approved Determination and cleared Payment.
promptHints: Block issuance unless Payment is Cleared or a fee waiver is on file.

sources.snippet: `IssuePermit` consumes the approved Determination and the cleared Payment; produces a `Permit` in status `Active` with an issue date and expiry per `[BR-13]`.

actions.name: ScheduleInspection
actions.description: Creates a Scheduled Inspection for permit classes requiring a physical check.
actions.descriptionZh: 为须实地检查的许可类别创建已排期验收。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event PERMIT_ISSUED has been received
2. Rule "Inspectable Permit requires passed Inspection" is satisfied

action_steps.name: determineWhetherThePermitClassIs
action_steps.description: Determine whether the permit class is inspectable.

rules.name: Inspectable Permit requires passed Inspection
rules.description: A Permit in an inspectable class is required to undergo a physical Inspection, and may not move to Active-Verified status until that Inspection is recorded as Passed.

action_steps.name: createAnInspectionInStatusScheduled
action_steps.description: Create an Inspection in status Scheduled and assign an Inspector.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated system responsible for the "ScheduleInspection" action. Creates a Scheduled Inspection for permit classes requiring a physical check. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "ScheduleInspection" using permit. Creates a Scheduled Inspection for permit classes requiring a physical check. Produce inspection and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Determine whether the permit class is inspectable.
text.zh: 判断许可类别是否需验收。

text.en: Create an Inspection in status Scheduled and assign an Inspector.
text.zh: 创建状态为已排期的验收并指派检查员。

agent.toolDescription: Schedule a physical Inspection for an inspectable Permit.

sources.snippet: `ScheduleInspection` creates an `Inspection` in status `Scheduled` for permit classes that require a physical check per `[BR-10]`.

actions.name: RecordInspectionResult
actions.description: Records an Inspection as Passed or Failed; a Failed result moves the Permit to ConditionalHold and sets a re-inspection window.
actions.descriptionZh: 将验收记录为通过或不通过；不通过则将许可置为条件保留并设定复检窗口。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event INSPECTION_SCHEDULED has been received
2. Rule "Re-inspect failed Permit within 30 days or revoke" is satisfied

action_steps.name: recordFindingsAndSetStatusPassed
action_steps.description: Record findings and set status Passed or Failed.

action_steps.name: onFailedMovePermitToConditional
action_steps.description: On Failed, move Permit to ConditionalHold and require re-inspection within 30 days.

rules.name: Re-inspect failed Permit within 30 days or revoke
rules.description: A Permit whose Inspection is recorded as Failed must be re-inspected within 30 calendar days, after which an unresolved failure moves the Permit to Revoked.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "RecordInspectionResult" action. Records an Inspection as Passed or Failed; a Failed result moves the Permit to ConditionalHold and sets a re-inspection window. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "RecordInspectionResult" using inspection. Records an Inspection as Passed or Failed; a Failed result moves the Permit to ConditionalHold and sets a re-inspection window. Produce inspection and emit the appropriate events.

data_changes.description: Inspection.status := Passed | Failed; Permit.status := Active-Verified | ConditionalHold

text.en: Record findings and set status Passed or Failed.
text.zh: 记录检查发现并置为通过或不通过。

text.en: On Failed, move Permit to ConditionalHold and require re-inspection within 30 days.
text.zh: 不通过时将许可置为条件保留并要求 30 日内复检。

sideEffects.description: Inspection.status := Passed | Failed; Permit.status := Active-Verified | ConditionalHold

agent.toolDescription: Record an Inspection outcome and update Permit status accordingly.

sources.snippet: `RecordInspectionResult` records `Passed` or `Failed` with findings. A `Failed` result moves the Permit to `ConditionalHold` and requires re-inspection within the window in `[BR-14]`.

actions.name: NotifyDetermination
actions.description: Renders the recorded Determination into a decision notice with appeal rights and deadline, and sends it to the Applicant.
actions.descriptionZh: 将已记录裁定渲染为含申诉权利与期限的决定通知并发送给申请人。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event DETERMINATION_RECORDED has been received
2. Event APPEAL_DECIDED has been received
3. Rule "Appeal filing window of 30 days" is satisfied

action_steps.name: renderTheDecisionNoticeIncludingAppeal
action_steps.description: Render the decision notice including appeal rights and the 30-day deadline.

rules.name: Appeal filing window of 30 days
rules.description: An Appeal must be filed within 30 calendar days of the DeterminationNotified event, after which the Determination is final.

action_steps.name: sendTheNoticeToTheApplicant
action_steps.description: Send the notice to the Applicant via NOTIFY.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated system responsible for the "NotifyDetermination" action. Renders the recorded Determination into a decision notice with appeal rights and deadline, and sends it to the Applicant. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "NotifyDetermination" using determination, applicant. Renders the recorded Determination into a decision notice with appeal rights and deadline, and sends it to the Applicant. Produce determination and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Render the decision notice including appeal rights and the 30-day deadline.
text.zh: 渲染含申诉权利与 30 日期限的决定通知。

text.en: Send the notice to the Applicant via NOTIFY.
text.zh: 通过 NOTIFY 将通知发送给申请人。

agent.toolDescription: Render and send the decision notice with appeal rights to the Applicant.

sources.snippet: the recorded Determination is rendered into a decision notice and sent to the Applicant. The notice text includes appeal rights and the deadline under `[BR-11]`.

actions.name: FileAppeal
actions.description: Applicant files an Appeal against a contested Determination within 30 calendar days, pausing any benefit reduction.
actions.descriptionZh: 申请人在 30 个日历日内对争议裁定提出申诉，并暂停任何福利削减。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event DETERMINATION_NOTIFIED has been received
2. Rule "Appeal filing window of 30 days" is satisfied
3. Rule "Pause benefit reduction once Appeal filed" is satisfied

action_steps.name: confirmTheAppealIsFiledWithin
action_steps.description: Confirm the Appeal is filed within 30 calendar days of DeterminationNotified.

rules.name: Appeal filing window of 30 days
rules.description: An Appeal must be filed within 30 calendar days of the DeterminationNotified event, after which the Determination is final.

action_steps.name: createTheAppealInStatusFiled
action_steps.description: Create the Appeal in status Filed and pause any benefit reduction.

rules.name: Pause benefit reduction once Appeal filed
rules.description: A benefit reduction or suspension shall be paused once an Appeal is filed and may not resume until the AppealDecided event.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "FileAppeal" action. Applicant files an Appeal against a contested Determination within 30 calendar days, pausing any benefit reduction. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "FileAppeal" using determination, grounds. Applicant files an Appeal against a contested Determination within 30 calendar days, pausing any benefit reduction. Produce appeal and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Confirm the Appeal is filed within 30 calendar days of DeterminationNotified.
text.zh: 确认申诉在 DeterminationNotified 后 30 个日历日内提出。

text.en: Create the Appeal in status Filed and pause any benefit reduction.
text.zh: 创建状态为已提出的申诉并暂停任何福利削减。

agent.toolDescription: File an Appeal against a Determination within the statutory window.

sources.snippet: `FileAppeal` consumes the contested `Determination` and the Applicant's stated grounds; produces an `Appeal` in status `Filed`.

actions.name: DecideAppeal
actions.description: Appeals Officer records the Appeal outcome as Upheld or Overturned within 45 calendar days; an overturn revises the Determination.
actions.descriptionZh: 申诉官在 45 个日历日内将申诉结果记录为维持或推翻；推翻则修订裁定。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event APPEAL_FILED has been received
2. Rule "Appeal decision within 45 days" is satisfied
3. Rule "Determination records ruleset version in force" is satisfied

action_steps.name: reviewTheOriginalCaseRecordAnd
action_steps.description: Review the original Case record and the ruleset version in force on the determination date.

rules.name: Determination records ruleset version in force
rules.description: A Determination must record the version of the EligibilityCriterion rule set that was in force on the determination date.

action_steps.name: recordUpheldStandsOrOverturnedRevise
action_steps.description: Record Upheld (stands) or Overturned (revise Determination in place, preserving prior version) within 45 days.

rules.name: Appeal decision within 45 days
rules.description: An Appeals Officer is required to issue the AppealDecided outcome within 45 calendar days of the AppealFiled event.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "DecideAppeal" action. Appeals Officer records the Appeal outcome as Upheld or Overturned within 45 calendar days; an overturn revises the Determination. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "DecideAppeal" using appeal, case. Appeals Officer records the Appeal outcome as Upheld or Overturned within 45 calendar days; an overturn revises the Determination. Produce appeal, determination and emit the appropriate events.

data_changes.description: Appeal.status := Upheld | Overturned; revise Determination on overturn.

text.en: Review the original Case record and the ruleset version in force on the determination date.
text.zh: 审查原始案件记录与裁定之日生效的规则集版本。

text.en: Record Upheld (stands) or Overturned (revise Determination in place, preserving prior version) within 45 days.
text.zh: 在 45 日内记录维持（不变）或推翻（就地修订裁定并保留先前版本）。

sideEffects.description: Appeal.status := Upheld | Overturned; revise Determination on overturn.

agent.toolDescription: Decide an Appeal as Upheld or Overturned and revise the Determination if overturned.
promptHints: Apply the ruleset version in force on the original determination date.

sources.snippet: `DecideAppeal` records the outcome as `Upheld` (original Determination stands) or `Overturned` (Determination is revised).

actions.name: TriggerRecertification
actions.description: At the recertification interval the system generates a recertification task and notifies the Applicant; lapses suspend the Case.
actions.descriptionZh: 在复核间隔到期时系统生成复核任务并通知申请人；逾期失效则中止案件。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Rule "Recertify benefit Case every 12 months" is satisfied
2. Rule "Suspend Case on recertification lapse past grace" is satisfied

action_steps.name: atTheRecertificationIntervalGenerateA
action_steps.description: At the recertification interval, generate a recertification task for the Case.

rules.name: Recertify benefit Case every 12 months
rules.description: A benefit Case must be recertified at least every 12 months, and a Household may not continue receiving benefits past the recertification due date without a renewed Determination.

action_steps.name: ifRecertificationLapsesPastThe14
action_steps.description: If recertification lapses past the 14-day grace, suspend the Case and expire any Permit.

rules.name: Suspend Case on recertification lapse past grace
rules.description: A Case whose recertification lapses beyond a 14-day grace period shall be suspended automatically, and the associated Permit, if any, shall move to Expired.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated system responsible for the "TriggerRecertification" action. At the recertification interval the system generates a recertification task and notifies the Applicant; lapses suspend the Case. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "TriggerRecertification" using case. At the recertification interval the system generates a recertification task and notifies the Applicant; lapses suspend the Case. Produce case and emit the appropriate events.

data_changes.description: Case.status := Suspended on lapse; Permit.status := Expired.

text.en: At the recertification interval, generate a recertification task for the Case.
text.zh: 在复核间隔到期时为案件生成复核任务。

text.en: If recertification lapses past the 14-day grace, suspend the Case and expire any Permit.
text.zh: 若复核逾 14 天宽限期失效，则中止案件并使任何许可到期。

sideEffects.description: Case.status := Suspended on lapse; Permit.status := Expired.

agent.toolDescription: Trigger recertification for a Case and suspend it on lapse past the grace period.

sources.snippet: at the recertification interval `[BR-17]`, the system generates a recertification task and notifies the Applicant.

events.name: APPLICATION_SUBMITTED
events.description: An Application was submitted via the portal; starts the statutory processing clock.
events.descriptionZh: 申请已通过门户提交；启动法定处理时钟。

sources.snippet: `ApplicationSubmitted` | PORTAL | PBE-CMS | `application_id`, `submitted_at`

events.name: APPLICATION_ACCEPTED
events.description: An Application passed completeness screening and was Accepted.
events.descriptionZh: 申请通过完整性审查并被受理。

sources.snippet: `ApplicationAccepted` / `ApplicationReturned` | PBE-CMS | PORTAL, NOTIFY | `application_id`, missing-doc list

events.name: APPLICATION_RETURNED
events.description: An Application was returned as incomplete, suspending the processing clock.
events.descriptionZh: 申请因不完整被退回，暂停处理时钟。

payloadFields.name: missing_doc_list
payloadFields.description: List of missing required Document types.

sources.snippet: emits **`ApplicationAccepted`** or **`ApplicationReturned`**. A return suspends the clock per `[BR-04]`.

events.name: DOCUMENT_VERIFIED
events.description: A Document was verified by a Caseworker.
events.descriptionZh: 文件已由个案工作者核验。

sources.snippet: `DocumentVerified` / `DocumentRejected` | DMS | PBE-CMS | `document_id`, status, reason

events.name: DOCUMENT_REJECTED
events.description: A Document failed verification and was rejected, looping back to a Document request.
events.descriptionZh: 文件核验未通过被拒绝，回退至补件请求。

sources.snippet: emits **`DocumentVerified`** (or **`DocumentRejected`**, which loops back to a Document request).

events.name: ELIGIBILITY_EVALUATED
events.description: Eligibility was evaluated and a draft Determination produced with the decisive criterion.
events.descriptionZh: 资格已评估并生成带决定性条件的裁定草稿。

sources.snippet: `EligibilityEvaluated` | PBE-CMS | PBE-CMS | `case_id`, `decisive_criterion_id`

events.name: APPROVAL_REQUESTED
events.description: A Determination exceeding caseworker authority was routed to the Supervisor queue.
events.descriptionZh: 超过个案工作者权限的裁定被路由至主管队列。

sources.snippet: `ApprovalRequested` | PBE-CMS | PBE-CMS (Supervisor queue) | `determination_id`, `benefit_value`

events.name: DETERMINATION_RECORDED
events.description: A Determination was finalized as Approved or Denied.
events.descriptionZh: 裁定已定案为批准或拒绝。

sources.snippet: `DeterminationRecorded` | PBE-CMS | NOTIFY, PAY | `determination_id`, `outcome`

events.name: DETERMINATION_NOTIFIED
events.description: A decision notice with appeal rights and deadline was sent to the Applicant.
events.descriptionZh: 含申诉权利与期限的决定通知已发送给申请人。

sources.snippet: `DeterminationNotified` | NOTIFY | Applicant | notice, appeal deadline

events.name: PAYMENT_CLEARED
events.description: A permit fee Payment cleared in full.
events.descriptionZh: 许可费缴费已全额结清。

sources.snippet: `PaymentCleared` / `PaymentFailed` | PAY | PBE-CMS | `payment_id`, `amount`, status

events.name: PAYMENT_FAILED
events.description: A permit fee Payment failed to clear.

sources.snippet: emits **`PaymentCleared`** or **`PaymentFailed`**.

events.name: PERMIT_ISSUED
events.description: A Permit was issued in status Active with an expiry date.
events.descriptionZh: 许可已核发为活动状态并设定到期日。

sources.snippet: `PermitIssued` | PBE-CMS | PORTAL, NOTIFY | `permit_id`, `expires_at`

events.name: INSPECTION_SCHEDULED
events.description: An Inspection was scheduled for an inspectable Permit.
events.descriptionZh: 已为须验收的许可安排验收。

sources.snippet: `InspectionScheduled` | PBE-CMS | Inspector | `inspection_id`, `permit_id`

events.name: INSPECTION_PASSED
events.description: An Inspection was recorded as Passed, allowing the Permit to move to Active-Verified.
events.descriptionZh: 验收记录为通过，许可可转为 Active-Verified。

sources.snippet: `InspectionPassed` / `InspectionFailed` | PBE-CMS | PBE-CMS | `inspection_id`, findings

events.name: INSPECTION_FAILED
events.description: An Inspection was recorded as Failed, moving the Permit to ConditionalHold with a re-inspection window.
events.descriptionZh: 验收记录为不通过，许可转为条件保留并设定复检窗口。

sources.snippet: emits **`InspectionPassed`** or **`InspectionFailed`**.

events.name: APPEAL_FILED
events.description: An Appeal was filed against a Determination, pausing benefit reduction.
events.descriptionZh: 已对裁定提出申诉，暂停福利削减。

sources.snippet: `AppealFiled` | PORTAL | PBE-CMS | `appeal_id`, `determination_id`

events.name: APPEAL_DECIDED
events.description: An Appeal was decided as Upheld or Overturned.
events.descriptionZh: 申诉已裁决为维持或推翻。

sources.snippet: `AppealDecided` | PBE-CMS | NOTIFY | `appeal_id`, outcome

events.name: RECERTIFICATION_DUE
events.description: A Case reached its recertification due date and a recertification task was generated.
events.descriptionZh: 案件已达复核到期日并生成复核任务。

sources.snippet: `RecertificationDue` | PBE-CMS | NOTIFY, Applicant | `case_id`, `recert_due_date`

events.name: CASE_SUSPENDED
events.description: A Case was automatically suspended on recertification lapse past the grace period.
events.descriptionZh: 案件因复核逾宽限期失效被自动中止。

sources.snippet: `CaseSuspended` | PBE-CMS | NOTIFY | `case_id`, reason

processes.description: From portal submission through completeness screening, document verification, eligibility evaluation, recording (or escalating) the Determination, to notifying the Applicant.

actions.name: submitApplication
actions.description: Applicant submits a draft Application and Document set via the portal, producing a Submitted Application and opening a Case.

actions.name: screenCompleteness
actions.description: Intake Clerk checks the submitted Document set against the required-Document list, accepting or returning the Application.

actions.name: verifyDocument
actions.description: Caseworker verifies each Document content from DMS, marking it Verified or Rejected with a reason code.

actions.name: evaluateEligibility
actions.description: Caseworker (via the eligibility engine) tests verified Application and Household data against the active EligibilityCriterion set, producing a draft Determination.

actions.name: recordDetermination
actions.description: Caseworker finalizes the draft Determination as Approved or Denied, snapshotting the ruleset version and citation.

actions.name: notifyDetermination
actions.description: Renders the recorded Determination into a decision notice with appeal rights and deadline, and sends it to the Applicant.

triggers.description: Applicant submits an Application in PORTAL.

sources.snippet: ## 4. Process — Intake to Determination (受理到裁定)

processes.description: For approved permit Determinations: collect the fee, issue the Permit, and (for inspectable classes) schedule and record the physical Inspection.

actions.name: collectPayment
actions.description: Collects the permit fee through the payment gateway, producing a Cleared (or Failed) Payment.

actions.name: issuePermit
actions.description: Issues an Active Permit from an approved Determination and a cleared Payment, with issue and expiry dates.

actions.name: scheduleInspection
actions.description: Creates a Scheduled Inspection for permit classes requiring a physical check.

actions.name: recordInspectionResult
actions.description: Records an Inspection as Passed or Failed; a Failed result moves the Permit to ConditionalHold and sets a re-inspection window.

triggers.description: An Approved permit-type Determination is recorded.

sources.snippet: ## 5. Process — Permit Issuance to Inspection (核发到验收)

processes.description: An Applicant files an Appeal against a Determination within 30 days; the Appeals Officer reviews and decides within 45 days, then the revised decision is notified.

actions.name: fileAppeal
actions.description: Applicant files an Appeal against a contested Determination within 30 calendar days, pausing any benefit reduction.

actions.name: decideAppeal
actions.description: Appeals Officer records the Appeal outcome as Upheld or Overturned within 45 calendar days; an overturn revises the Determination.

actions.name: notifyDetermination
actions.description: Renders the recorded Determination into a decision notice with appeal rights and deadline, and sends it to the Applicant.

sources.snippet: ## 6. Process — Determination to Appeal (裁定到申诉)

processes.description: At the recertification interval the system triggers recertification; the Applicant and Caseworker re-run document verification, eligibility evaluation, and determination on refreshed data, else the Case is suspended.

actions.name: triggerRecertification
actions.description: At the recertification interval the system generates a recertification task and notifies the Applicant; lapses suspend the Case.

actions.name: verifyDocument
actions.description: Caseworker verifies each Document content from DMS, marking it Verified or Rejected with a reason code.

actions.name: evaluateEligibility
actions.description: Caseworker (via the eligibility engine) tests verified Application and Household data against the active EligibilityCriterion set, producing a draft Determination.

actions.name: recordDetermination
actions.description: Caseworker finalizes the draft Determination as Approved or Denied, snapshotting the ruleset version and citation.

triggers.description: Monthly scan for Cases reaching their recertification due date (at least every 12 months).

sources.snippet: ## 7. Process — Renewal & Recertification (续期复核)

stageCritiques.objects: 11 entity ObjectTypes extracted directly from §2 of the systems-and-data doc with PK/FK key roles and closed-vocabulary types; all attributes grounded.
stageCritiques.rules: 20 atomic [BR-nn] clauses plus 2 exceptions-register rules, mined sentence-by-sentence and clustered into 7 RuleGroups by lifecycle.
stageCritiques.actions: 13 catalog actions plus the inferred EscalateForApproval (called from RecordDetermination); typed I/O, ordered steps, guard rules, and AgentBinding tools.
stageCritiques.events: 19 events from the integration table and SOP; producedBy/consumedBy are the exact inverse of action emitsEvents/triggeredByEventIds.
stageCritiques.processes: 4 named SOP processes (§4-§7) chained as event-driven step-graphs with branch conditions and orchestration specs.
